Allow multiple account credentials #326

Open
octocat
I have two accounts on github and want to switch between them easily.
eXamadeus May 4, 2020
Is there currently a way to work around this by removing the current authentication?
mislav May 5, 2020
You can use GH_TOKEN environment variable as a workaround for now.
